flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 47% at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Cupey Campus vs the 2003–2007 baseline (4.6k vs 8.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Cupey Campus rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $7.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Cupey Campus rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $7.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Cupey Campus rose 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.7k → $14.2k).
